title: Salty Tender Venezuelan Chicken Skewers
description: A weeknight-friendly Venezuelan dish featuring chicken skewers marinated in a salty and sweet mixture, then grilled to perfection. This low-fat-friendly recipe is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together guava jam, soy sauce, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat
Thread the marinated chicken onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through
Transfer the skewers to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired
Reduce the marinade by cooking it in a small saucepan over medium heat until thickened, about 5 minutes
Serve the reduced marinade alongside the skewers
